sections.paragraph:
δημιουργός
Etym. *ἔργω

I. one who works for the people, a skilled workman, handicraftsman, Od., etc.; of medical practitioners, Plat.; of sculptors, Plat.:—generally, a framer, maker; λόγων Aeschin.; πειθοῦς δημιουργὸς ἡ ρητορική Plat.: metaph., ὄρθρος δημιοεργός morn that calls man to work, Hhymn.

2. the Maker of the world, Xen., Plat.

II. in some Peloponnesian states, the name of a magistrate, Thuc., Dem.
